_doc: Comic-strip metadata for the landing-page story rail. Each panel's actual prompt lives in tools/gemini-art/prompts.json under the `stories` bucket, keyed by `key` here. Sprite output: cinematic 1024x576 painterly illustration, opaque PNG fine. Saved to assets/sprites/<key>.{webp,png} via the same admin save path as units/heroes.

stories.title: Three Springs Ago
stories.subtitle: How the kingdom broke. Six panels, frost to first raid.

stories.title: The Tale of the Four Crowns
stories.subtitle: Four heroes. Four crowns. One war.
